reviews.comment:
Tuvimos una situación sospechosa con la carga. Estén atentos.

(Translated by Google)
We had a suspicious situation with the cargo. Please be vigilant.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xGRmN6VmtaRzF5ZG1FeU1UVTViVzlzUkVWT1NXYxAB

reviews.comment:
Baños limpios, la atención por parte del playero fue correcta y agradable. Pero no te ofrecen limpiar los cristales. Tampoco se los pedí x acostumbro a que te ofrezcan ellos mismos cuando llenó el tanque. Asumo que se les pasó y lo tomo como un detalle menos. No tienen full eso no me gustó para nada siempre consumo en el full y pago con la aplicación por los puntos que sumas en al app de YPF, deben modernizar ese aspecto. Venden YPF gas tmb.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were clean, and the attendant was polite and friendly. However, they don't offer to clean the windshields. I didn't ask either, as I'm used to them offering to clean them when I fill up. I assume they forgot and I consider it a minor detail. They don't have a full tank, which I didn't like at all. I always fill up and pay with the YPF points I accumulate on the app; they need to modernize that aspect. They also sell YPF gas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21JeFVYRTBYMnc1ZFhKNlVqQlBjV053WTFaa2NHYxAB
